task_completion.description: The agent opens and edits the Laravel frontend files located in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal where the agent is modifying files within the /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ directory.

task_completion.description: The agent opens a web browser and navigates to the local Socioboard instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost' or a sub-path of it.

task_completion.description: The HTML title of the web interface is updated to the new branding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser tab title clearly displays 'Apex Social Hub'.

task_completion.description: The login page heading is updated to the new branding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text/heading on the login page displays 'Welcome to Apex Digital Media'.

task_completion.description: The top navigation bar background color is updated to the new branding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top navigation bar of the web interface has a dark blue background color corresponding to '#1B2A4A'.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual source files rather than using browser Developer Tools to temporarily alter the page appearance.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are open and being used to inject the expected text or colors directly into the live DOM.

integrity.description: The agent edited the actual files in the specified directory rather than creating a mock HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the text editor or terminal commands must point to /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ instead of a random local directory.

integrity.description: The final result is verified by rendering the application in a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the changes reflected in a graphical web browser at 'http://localhost', not just as HTML text output in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected HTML title is 'Apex Social Hub'. The expected login page heading is 'Welcome to Apex Digital Media'. The expected top navigation bar background color is '#1B2A4A' (a dark blue shade).
